creator: rea-fbsd@codelabs.ru
text:
There is a good Trac plugin that greatly simplifies ticket keyword
management,
  http://trac-hacks.org/wiki/TracKeywordsPlugin
and it is still not in the FreeBSD ports.

Fix: 

Shar archive for the port is available at
  http://codelabs.ru/fbsd/ports/trac-keywords/new-port.shar

The port was tested on my Tinderbox for 7.x/8.x/9.x and it also
works at our Trac instance for some months.
How-To-Repeat: 
N/A
